agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Define reusable agents (prompt, model, tools) to compose into teams.
agents.empty: No agents. Create one to start composing teams.

teams.title: Agent teams
teams.subtitle: Compose multiple agents with a topology (supervisor / sequential / parallel).
teams.empty: No teams. Create agents then compose them into a team.

modal.name: Name
modal.exposeAgentTitle: If enabled, the agent is callable as the tool agent_<name> from chat and from other agents: the main model delegates a task to it without seeing its internal tools (hierarchical delegation).
modal.exposeTeamTitle: If enabled, the team is callable as the tool team_<name> from chat: the main model delegates a task to it (hierarchical delegation).
modal.topologySupervisor: supervisor (one agent delegates to the others)
